channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: New Travel Assistance Provider - Crisis24
item.description: Effective July 1, 2026, RPI has transitioned its travel assistance provider from International SOS to Crisis24. Crisis24 provides 24/7/365 medical, security, and travel assistance for authorized RPI travelers while traveling on Institute-related business or activities. Before traveling, please review the resources found at this announcement link for details on the Crisis24 benefits and features and how to access Crisis24. Also be sure to save the Crisis24 emergency contact information phone…
item.author: Community

item.title: Celebrating June Staff Promotions!
item.description:
Congratulations to our colleagues who were promoted in June! Your hard work, dedication, and commitment to excellence continue to make a meaningful impact across RPI. We celebrate your achievement and wish you continued success as you embark on this exciting new chapter. 🎉👏

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
